❀✿＊* What's going on:

Mallon calved for the first time not so long ago. He has not yet gotten used to such a fullness in his chest, and now that he no longer needs to feed the calf, it seems to him that he is going crazy.

Even after regular milking twice a day, his chest seems to remain full and sore. His instincts are screaming with the need to breed more and feed his calves so much that they suck all the milk out of his chest.

But there is no such possibility yet... Perhaps you can help him in his desperate situation?

The GREEN MOUNTAIN Farm

This is a farm in Texas, located about 100 kilometers from Houston. The farm was founded in 1948 by the Sommers family, and initially, the "Green Mountain" was a traditional dairy farm with conventional cattle.

However, after the emergence of the human gene mutation, the farm changed its focus and began using demi-humans to produce high-quality dairy products. Over time, the farm completely eliminated conventional cows and replaced them with demi-humans, which, although more challenging to maintain, produced delicious and high-quality dairy products.
